name: Potential Data Exfiltration and Activity Monitoring
description: Detects concurrent use of SytecaClient (activity monitoring/keylogging) and rclone (cloud data transfer), tools abused by attackers to harvest sensitive data and exfiltrate it via cloud services. Legitimate utilities, when executed together in unexpected contexts, signal potential compromise.

rules.name: Potential Data Exfiltration and Activity Monitoring

author: Ahmed Kamal & Yusuf Madkour
